expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md includes multiple explicit scenarios with observable verification leaves for window title, e.g. “Workstation window title is correct when creating a blank report” with checks “Workstation window title is human-readable (not an internal key such as `newReportWithApplication`)” and “Workstation window title matches the opened report’s name/context…”. execution_notes.md also states it “ensure[s] SDK/API-visible outcomes (e.g., window title) are explicit observable verification leaves.”

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md declares the primary phase under test as “Phase 4a” and describes the produced result as “A Phase 4a-aligned scenario set (subcategory-first; no canonical top-layer categories)”. result.md is titled “Phase 4a … Defect Replay Anchor Scenarios” and is structured as subcategory → scenario → steps → observable leaves, consistent with the stated Phase 4a contract focus.
